_meta.note: Mundane and minor mythical equipment. tagIds reference ids in tags.json (filter appliesTo includes "equipment" in editors). Many `eqDa*` entries summarize Divine Armory appendix gear (7711-Divine_Armory*.pdf); confirm tags at the table.

eqHandWeapon.name: One-handed weapon (template)
eqHandWeapon.description: Sword, axe, machete — define look and legal status in play.
eqHandWeapon.mechanicalEffects: Use with Close Combat + Might (or table variant).

eqTacticalVest.name: Tactical vest
eqTacticalVest.description: Pouches, plates optional; reads ‘prepared’ in urban scenes.
eqTacticalVest.mechanicalEffects: Narrative armor / cover; confirm Soft/Hard armor with SG.

eqBinoculars.name: Field binoculars
eqBinoculars.description: Glassing distance targets or city skylines.
eqBinoculars.mechanicalEffects: Enhancement to Survey / perception pools when fiction fits.

eqDaKnife.name: Knife (Divine Armory)
eqDaKnife.description: General-purpose blade; easy to hide or throw.
eqDaKnife.mechanicalEffects: Divine Armory appendix total 1 tag point; confirm Stunts with SG.
eqDaKnife.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix List of Weapons.

eqDaSword.name: Sword (Divine Armory)
eqDaSword.mechanicalEffects: Appendix total 2; useful for varied stunts per Versatile weapon tag.
eqDaSword.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaSpear.name: Spear (Divine Armory)
eqDaSpear.mechanicalEffects: Appendix total 3; Defensive from Divine Armory (paraphrase in tags.json).
eqDaSpear.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaBattleAx.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaFragGrenade.name: Frag grenade (Divine Armory)
eqDaFragGrenade.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Scale 2 damage in area; one use.
eqDaFragGrenade.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix tactical weapons.

eqDaFlashbang.name: Flashbang (Divine Armory)
eqDaFlashbang.mechanicalEffects: Appendix uses major weapon Soft tier (−3); confirm area effects with SG.
eqDaFlashbang.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaRocketLauncherDisposable.name: Disposable rocket launcher (Divine Armory)
eqDaRocketLauncherDisposable.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Scale 2, single shot; Concealable reflects packed carry in the supplement’s fiction.
eqDaRocketLauncherDisposable.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaFlamethrower.name: Flamethrower (Divine Armory)

eqDaFlamethrower.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix tactical weapons.

eqDaLeatherArmor.name: Leather armor (Divine Armory)
eqDaLeatherArmor.mechanicalEffects: Appendix total 0; map ‘Armored: Soft’ to softArmor tag.
eqDaLeatherArmor.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix armor.

eqDaBulletproofVest.name: Bulletproof vest (Divine Armory)
eqDaBulletproofVest.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Resistant (bulletproof); Resistant tag in app covers typed resistance.
eqDaBulletproofVest.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaChainMail.name: Chain mail (Divine Armory)
eqDaChainMail.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Hard (1) + Resistant (arrows) + Weighty; confirm Hard dots with SG.
eqDaChainMail.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaFullPlate.name: Full plate (Divine Armory)
eqDaFullPlate.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Hard (3) + Cumbersome; use hardArmor note for second box cost if purchased.
eqDaFullPlate.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaBombSuit.name: Bomb suit (Divine Armory)
eqDaBombSuit.mechanicalEffects: Appendix total 0 with heavy Hard and multiple flaws.
eqDaBombSuit.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaHazmatSuit.name: Hazmat suit (Divine Armory)
eqDaHazmatSuit.mechanicalEffects: Appendix: Resistant (bioweapons, gas) at higher magnitude; not full rigid armor.
eqDaHazmatSuit.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.

eqDaHuntingSuit.source: Divine Armory (Storypath Nexus community content, Óskar Örn Eggertsson); verify in 7711-Divine_Armory.pdf; appendix.
